name: distinct founder visions yield measurably distinct tailored designs
command:
printf %s '{"complete":true,"answers":{"motivation":"revenue","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","budget_posture":"balanced","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"balanced","data_cadence":"real-time","workload":"appointment booking for my clinic","criticality":"mission-critical","data_sensitivity":"regulated","compliance_regime":"hipaa","scale":"large","consistency_need":"strong","communication_style":"event-driven","integration_scope":"external-partner"}}' > h.json
printf %s '{"complete":true,"answers":{"motivation":"cost-reduction","availability_tolerance":"days","data_loss_tolerance":"hours","budget_posture":"cost-first","data_volume":"small","read_write_pattern":"read-heavy","data_cadence":"batch","workload":"a newsletter and event signup page for my community group","criticality":"experimental","data_sensitivity":"internal","compliance_regime":"none","scale":"small","consistency_need":"eventual","communication_style":"synchronous","integration_scope":"internal-only"}}' > c.json
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh --vision "appointment booking for my clinic" --profile h.json --out-dir hh --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh --vision "community newsletter site" --profile c.json --out-dir cc --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
ruby -rjson -e 'a=JSON.parse(File.read("hh/technical-requirements.json"))["concerns_total"].to_i; b=JSON.parse(File.read("cc/technical-requirements.json"))["concerns_total"].to_i; abort unless a>b && a>0 && b>0' && echo distinct-visions-distinct-designs 1>&2
